page_content:
## 4. Dr. Jafari (The Research Connection)  
**Focus:** Professional PI outreach; referencing Trevor as the "Safe" bridge.  
**Subject:** Medical School LOR Request & Update: Arian Moridani (Former Research Volunteer)  
Dear Dr. Jafari,  
I hope this email finds you well and that the Advanced Robotics and Manufacturing Lab continues to thrive.  
I’ve been reflecting on my **200 hours** in your lab—especially our work on the **TVIM publication** and the senior design open house where we compared the optical clarity of my silicone aortic valve to vendor models. That conversation regarding precision in hemodynamic accuracy deeply shaped how I approach engineering today.  
Since graduating from UNT (**Cum Laude, 3.638 GPA**), I have been pursuing an **M.S. in Computer Science (Machine Learning)** at Georgia Tech. I am now applying to medical school with the goal of bringing that same attention to detail—and new skills in **Computer Vision**—into clinical practice.  
I would be honored if you would support my candidacy with a letter of recommendation. Because **Trevor Exley** oversaw my day-to-day work, I have also reached out to him to provide an update on my progress. To assist you, I’ve attached my **updated CV** and a **summary of my recent work** at Georgia Tech.  
I’ve set up an **Interfolio** account so you only need to upload your letter **once** for all my applications. Thank you for your time and continued mentorship.  
Best regards,  
Arian Moridani  
806-340-4502  
---
